HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gregory Cabiness judgment debtor in propria persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. After hearing, claim of exemption is GRANTED in the amount of $2,300. Any funds withheld are ordered returned to the Judgment debtor. The exemption remain in effect until April 23, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
